name: Stringbeans in Walnut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or with a mortar and pestle, pulverize the walnuts into a paste.
2. Combine the chicken stock, onions, garlic, paprika, vinegar, salt, walnut paste, and cilantro in a bowl. Mix thoroughly.
3. Trim but do not cut the string beans.
4. Bring water to boil in a large pot. Add the trimmed string beans and boil for 10 minutes. Drain the beans well.
5. Add the drained string beans to the walnut paste mixture and toss until coated completely with the mixture.
6. Serve immediately.
